name: The Prism
depiction: A beam of light refracting through a prism
effect: Immediately draw a card of each other suit 🌈

name: Wheel of Fortune
depiction: A colorful spinning wheel divided into strange symbols
effect: All creatures in a 1 mile radius suffer from an effect from the wheel. Roll a d6 ||[[d6]]||: 1-Heal [[4d8]] HP and one level of exhaustion, 2-The next crop harvest will have double yields, 3-Grant inspiration, 4-Range of all attacks halved for the next minute, 5-Speed halved for the next minute, 6-Knocked prone) 🎡

name: Mirrored Madness
depiction: A mirror hall at a funhouse filled with warped reflections
effect: For 10 minutes, creatures within one mile see illusions of themselves acting out their worst fears, causing all saving throws against fear effects to have disadvantage 😱

name: Tightrope Walk
depiction: A tightrope stretched between two trees with a clown walking upside down under it
effect: For the next minute, all creatures within a mile are buffeted by strange gravitational waves. Creatures who move more than half their speed on their turn must pass a DC [[2d6+6]] Dexterity Save or fall prone 🎪

name: Stolen Voice
depiction: A disembodied mouth with a bead of energy emerging from it
effect: For the next 10 minutes, all creatures within a mile have their voices replaced with that of a random creature of the same type 🙊

name: Lost in the Woods
depiction: A confused person standing seemingly right side up on the underside of a dense forest canopy
effect: For the next hour, the surrounding terrain seems to shift and change when not being looked at. Mundane and magical sensors seem to shift randomly, and the sky seems to slowly spin around. Navigating within the affected area is impossible without a DC [[2d6+6]] Survival Check

name: Oldest Joke in the Book
depiction: As you gaze at the card, your mind reels, unable to truly comprehend what it sees. You look away quickly. Was that... a clown monster? A horrid jester? A trickster god?
effect: ||It was never truly asleep||||, but now it stirs... ||🤡

name: Bounce House
depiction: A inflated bounce castle with a smiling face on it
effect: For the next hour, all creatures within a mile are affected by a strange gravity-altering effect. They can jump twice as high and far, but must succeed on a DC [[2d6+6]] Dexterity Save or be knocked prone when they land 🏰

name: Mirror of Truth
depiction: A mirror that seems to peer deep inside the mind of the viewer
effect: For the next hour, all creatures within a mile see illusions of what people think instead of what they are actually doing. Affected creatures have advantage on Insight checks, and disadvantage on Deception, Perception, and Persuasion checks 🪞

name: Jorrick's Mask
depiction: A porcelain mask with colorful makeup and a wide smile
effect: For the next minute, creatures within a mile find the mundane hilarious. Whenever a creature within the affected area makes a d20 test (other than a Save), they must pass a DC [[2d6+6]] Wisdom Save or burst into laughter, incapacitating them for one round 😂

name: Magician's Wand
depiction: A archetypal magician's wand with a corny star on the tip
effect: For the next hour, whenever a spell is cast within a mile, there is a 50% chance it will cause a wild magic surge 🪄

name: Carnival of Lights
depiction: A fun-looking, but ghostly, carnival with colorful lights and strange music playing
effect: For the next hour, open space within a mile is filled by a spectral carnival. Creatures within the area must succeed on a DC [[2d6+6]] Wisdom Save or be charmed by the carnival, causing them to engage with the carnival and be distracted by the sights and sounds. Any damage ends the effect for that creature 🎠

name: Fool's Whispers
depiction: A yelling mouth next to an ear
effect: For the next hour, all thoughts become audible whispers. Creatures within the area have disadvantage on Stealth, and Deception, and advantage on Insight checks 🗣️👂

name: Lucky Coin
depiction: A coin on its edge
effect: For the next minute, all creatures within a mile gain advantage on Saving Throws 🪙

name: A Good Laugh
depiction: A disembodied laughing mouth
effect: For the next minute, creatures within a mile roll a d4 at the beginning of their turn. on a 1, they spend their turn incapacitated, laughing uncontrollably 😂

name: The Web
depiction: A giant spider web with a grinning face woven in the center
effect: For the next minute, spidersilk rains from the sky within a mile, creating difficult (and flammable) terrain outdoors. Creatures outdoors within the area who did not move last turn must succeed on a DC [[2d6+6]] Dexterity Save or be restrained by the webs 🕸️

name: Mask of Madness
depiction: A twisted version of Jorrick's mask, with a sinister grin
effect: For the next hour, creatures within a mile are affected by a strange madness. They must succeed on a DC [[2d6+6]] Wisdom Save or be frightened of all other creatures, and have disadvantage on all attacks and ability checks against them. Affected creatures may attempt to save one per turn anytime they can't see another creature 😵

name: The Fool's Fortune
depiction: A hapless jester falling backwards into a pit of treasure
effect: Each creature within a mile must flip a coin. on a heads, they gain advantage on their next d20 test before the end of a long rest. On tails, they suffer disadvantage on their next d20 test before the end of a long rest 🎭

name: Night of the Living Clowns
depiction: A horde of ghostly clowns with glowing eyes
effect: All corpses that were once clowns within a mile rise as undead zombies 🧟

name: Shifting Sands
depiction: Dunes of multicolored sand shifting in the wind
effect: For the next minute, at the beginning of each creature within a mile's turn, they are teleported 5 feet in a random direction ⛱️

name: Double-Edged Sword
depiction: A sword with a blade that seems to shimmer and change color
effect: For the next minute, all creatures within a mile suffer from an ethereal weakness that gives a penalty of [[2d4]] to AC and Saving Throws ⚔️
